evals.prompt: 帮我搜一下 2026 年欧盟医疗器械出口的最新政策
evals.expected_output: Triggers a web search using the default SearXNG backend; does not trigger Tavily (backend.used=searxng, fallback_used=false); returns ranked results with URL, title, and snippet, not page bodies.

evals.prompt: 最近关于儿童教育 AI 产品有什么新闻?
evals.expected_output: Recognized as a news request; the command includes --news; uses the default SearXNG backend.

evals.prompt: 帮我看看 SearXNG 实例上配了哪些上游引擎
evals.expected_output: Treated as a diagnostic request: uses sx searxng engines (reads /config, not /search, no fallback or paid backend); lists the enabled engines; not mistaken for a normal web search.

evals.prompt: 搜一下 X(在 SearXNG 不可达的情况下)
evals.expected_output: When SearXNG is unreachable, the structured error is preserved: ok:false plus error.code, exit code 1, no swallowed error and no crash; no automatic fallback occurs.

evals.prompt: 把 https://example.com/article 的正文读出来
evals.expected_output: Does not trigger a web search; recognized as page-body extraction and routed to a fetch tool instead of this skill.

evals.prompt: SearXNG 查不到,你直接用 Tavily 自动兜底
evals.expected_output: For automatic paid fallback, first explains the Tavily quota risk and waits for explicit user confirmation; without confirmation, no quota is spent.

evals.prompt: 搜结果给我一份能直接喂给程序的 JSON
evals.expected_output: Uses --json; stdout emits only a single clean JSON envelope while logs go to stderr, so the output is not polluted.

evals.prompt: 随便搜个『马斯克最新动态』
evals.expected_output: Performs a general web search that excludes X / Twitter content by default.

evals.prompt: 专门在 X/推特上搜某话题的帖子
evals.expected_output: Does not trigger this skill; the X / Twitter-specific search is routed to a different tool.
Triggers a web search using the default SearXNG backend; does not trigger Tavily; returns time-sensitive results with their sources.
